name: Step by Step
concept: Sequencing — the computer does exactly what you say, in order

learn: A program is a list of instructions for the computer
The robot follows your blocks EXACTLY, in order, top to bottom
If something goes wrong, change your steps and try again — real coders call that debugging!

blocks.name: move forward
blocks.text: the robot walks one square in the direction it's facing

blocks.name: turn left
blocks.text: the robot spins to its left (it stays on the same square)

blocks.name: turn right
blocks.text: the robot spins to its right

blocks.name: collect gem
blocks.text: grabs the gem — but only if the robot is standing on it!

intro.goal: Collect every 💎 in each level. On the boss level, reach the 🏁 too!

recap: You wrote real programs — lists of instructions the robot followed exactly
Order matters! Step 1 happens before step 2, always
You debugged: when the robot bonked a wall, you fixed the steps and tried again
Fewer blocks = cleverer program. That's what the 3 stars reward!

levels.name: First Steps
levels.hint: Walk to the gem, then grab it! Try: move, move, collect 💎

levels.name: The Long Hallway
levels.hint: It's further this time. Count the steps to the gem! 🐾

levels.name: Turn Right
levels.hint: Walk to the corner, then use ↩️ turn right before walking down.

levels.name: Turn Left
levels.hint: This corner bends the other way — use ↪️ turn left!

levels.name: Two Gems
levels.hint: Collect the first gem BEFORE walking to the second one.

levels.name: Zigzag
levels.hint: Right turn, then a left turn. Follow the path with your finger first!

levels.name: Gem Corner
levels.hint: Grab the first gem on your way — don't walk past it!

levels.name: The Big U
levels.hint: Down, across, and back up — like the letter U!

levels.name: Treasure Tour
levels.hint: Three gems! Plan your whole route before you press play. 🗺️

levels.name: Boss: The Great Escape
levels.hint: Boss level! Collect BOTH gems, then reach the flag 🏁 to escape!
